vllm.title: API server support ipv4 / ipv6 dualstack
vllm.author: yunfeng-scale
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
using localhost for host resulted in
ERROR:    [Errno 99] error while attempting to bind on address ('::1', 8000, 0, 0): cannot assign requested address

more details in Kludex/uvicorn#1529 (reply in thread)
related to #217

vllm.title: Move bfloat16 check to worker
vllm.author: Yard1
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The bfloat16 check requires CUDA initialization. If using Ray workers (eg. for tensor parallelism), this will lead to Ray being unable to set the correct environment variables, leading to exceptions later. Moving this check to the worker after it has been initialized solves the issue.
